Title: LOAN-01A-BE-01 Loan products config (terms, rates, fees)
Description:
Goal: Create loan product configuration to avoid hardcoding rules.

Acceptance criteria:
- DB schema for loan_products including: repayment_frequency=WEEKLY, term_weeks, interest_model, interest_rate, application_fee, grace_period_days
- API endpoints: GET/POST/PUT loan products (admin-only)
- Seed at least 1 default product for testing

Title: LOAN-01A-BE-02 Loan application schema + statuses
Description:
Goal: Support loan application lifecycle states.

Acceptance criteria:
- DB tables: loan_applications, loan_guarantors (link to members), committee_reviews (optional table or fields)
- Statuses: PENDING_FEE, PENDING_GUARANTORS, PENDING_LOAN_OFFICER_VERIFICATION, PENDING_COMMITTEE_APPROVAL, APPROVED, REJECTED
- Audit fields + indexes by member_id and status

Title: LOAN-01A-BE-03 Application fee payment (M-Pesa STK) + GL posting
Description:
Goal: Application requires an application fee (auto-confirmed).

Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint to initiate application fee STK push for an application
- Callback updates payment status
- On SUCCESS: post GL journal using template Application Fee
- Application transitions from PENDING_FEE -> PENDING_GUARANTORS
- Idempotent callback handling (no double-posting)

Title: LOAN-01A-BE-04 Guarantors capture + validation
Description:
Goal: Capture guarantors for loan application.

Acceptance criteria:
- API to add/remove guarantors on an application
- Prevent duplicates; max guarantors configurable per product (optional)
- Read endpoint returns guarantors list

Title: LOAN-01A-BE-05 Loan officer verification & approval
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Permission: LOANS_APPROVE
- Endpoints: verify/approve/reject application
- On approve: transitions to PENDING_COMMITTEE_APPROVAL (or APPROVED if committee step disabled)
- Audit log: who approved/rejected and when

Title: LOAN-01A-BE-06 Committee approval step
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Permission: LOANS_COMMITTEE_APPROVE
- Endpoint: approve/reject at committee stage
- Audit log for committee decision
- On approve: application status -> APPROVED

Title: LOAN-01B-BE-01 Disbursement (Treasurer only) + GL posting
Description:
Goal: Treasurer disburses approved loans (not Loans Officer).

Acceptance criteria:
- Permission: LOANS_DISBURSE
- Endpoint: POST /loans/{id}/disburse
- Only allowed when application status APPROVED
- Create loan record + set disbursement_date
- Post GL journal (Disbursement template)
- Loan enters IN_GRACE state for grace_period_days

Title: LOAN-01C-BE-01 Loan schedule generation (weekly) with countdown
Description:
Goal: Generate fixed weekly due schedule that advances with time regardless of payment.

Acceptance criteria:
- Create schedule table: loan_schedule_items (week_no, due_date, amount_due, status)
- First due date = disbursement_date + grace_period_days (aligned to weekly cadence)
- Generate N weeks according to product.term_weeks
- Status transitions: DUE -> OVERDUE -> PAID (as payments are applied)

Title: LOAN-01C-BE-02 Weekly schedule job (advance periods + mark overdue)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Job runs daily (or weekly) to mark items past due as OVERDUE if not fully covered
- Must not depend on 'payment attempts'—overdue is based on due_date
- Emits/creates penalty trigger event for missed/underpaid installments (wired to PEN module)

Title: LOAN-01D-BE-01 M-Pesa loan repayment (STK) initiate + callback
Description:
Goal: Repayments are NOT manual; they are posted automatically via M-Pesa callbacks.

Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint for member to initiate STK push repayment for own loan
- Callback updates payment SUCCESS/FAILED
- On SUCCESS: create loan_repayment record and apply allocation engine
- Idempotent: prevent double posting if callback retries

Title: LOAN-01D-BE-02 Repayment allocation engine (interest->principal->credit)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Allocate repayment only to loan interest due, then principal due (oldest due first)
- Remainder becomes prepayment credit (covers future weeks)
- Underpayment creates/maintains arrears for that due period
- Penalties are NOT auto-deducted from repayments

Title: LOAN-01D-BE-03 Arrears + prepayment reporting endpoints
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Member endpoints: view outstanding, arrears, credit, next due
- Staff endpoints: arrears list across members
- Countdown reduces weekly regardless of payment; arrears computed from schedule coverage

Title: PEN-01-BE-01 Penalty rules schema (admin configurable)
Description:
Goal: Support multiple penalty types with rule-driven amounts and interest accrual timing.

Acceptance criteria:
- DB: penalty_rules (code, trigger, base_amount_type/value, grace_period_days, interest_period_days, interest_rate, interest_mode)
- Admin API to CRUD rules
- Seed rule: LOAN_MISSED_INSTALLMENT

Title: PEN-01-BE-02 Penalty instances + accrual ledger (audit + idempotent)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- DB: penalties (member_id, type, reference_type/id, status)
- DB: penalty_accruals (penalty_id, kind=PRINCIPAL|INTEREST, amount, accrued_at, idempotency_key)
- Each accrual links to GL journal via reference fields

Title: PEN-01-BE-03 Create loan missed-installment penalties from schedule job
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- When schedule item becomes OVERDUE/UNDERPAID: create penalty principal accrual (rule-based)
- Post GL journal: Dr Penalty Receivable / Cr Penalty Income (reference to accrual id)
- Do not auto-deduct from loan repayments

Title: PEN-01-BE-04 Penalty interest accrual job (periodic, rule-driven)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Job runs daily to add interest accrual when grace+period elapses
- Supports SIMPLE/COMPOUND modes per rule
- Posts GL journal: Dr Penalty Interest Receivable / Cr Penalty Interest Income

Title: PEN-01-BE-05 Penalty payment (STK) ONE/ALL + allocation + GL posting
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint: list member OPEN penalties (for dropdown)
- Initiate STK for ONE penalty or ALL penalties
- Allocation for ALL: oldest first; interest then principal per penalty; supports partial payments
- Post GL journal reducing receivables; mark penalties PAID when cleared

Title: PEN-01-BE-06 Treasurer waiver/adjustment creates GL reversing journal
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Permission: PENALTIES_WAIVE_ADJUST
- Endpoint to waive/adjust a penalty (full/partial)
- Must create reversing GL journal entry (no direct edit of financial truth)
- Audit log who waived and why

Title: LOAN-01-FE-01 Loan application UI (fee, guarantors, status tracking)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Member can create application, pay application fee (STK), add guarantors
- Shows application status through approval stages

Title: LOAN-01-FE-02 Staff approvals UI (Loan Officer + Committee)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Loan officer verify/approve/reject UI (permission-gated)
- Committee approval UI (permission-gated)

Title: LOAN-01-FE-03 Treasurer disbursement UI
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Treasurer sees approved loans and can disburse (permission-gated)
- Shows grace period and repayment start date

Title: LOAN-01-FE-04 Member loan dashboard (schedule, arrears, credit, repay)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Shows next due, running schedule, arrears, prepayment credit
- Member can initiate repayment (STK) and see status

Title: PEN-01-FE-01 Penalties tab (dynamic dropdown + pay ONE/ALL)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Dropdown lists only OPEN penalties; if none, hide/disable dropdown
- 'All' option present
- Initiate STK payment; show success/failure and refresh lists
